calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-30-2026 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jul-28-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Apr-06-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF ALEX PEREZ MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD.

The unopposed motion by Counsel Brian L. Larsen and Law Offices of Brian L. Larsen, counsel for Plaintiff Alex Perez, to be relieved as counsel is OFF CALENDAR.

Plaintiff has filed a Notice of Settlement, filed March 26, 2026. This motion, therefore, is ordered off calendar.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-04-2025 Set For Trial On Jun-01-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
